summary: Completed comprehensive Garment Factory ERP v8.0 regression testing. All 21 backend API endpoints working correctly after major refactoring. Frontend login and navigation fully functional. Successfully verified 'Made with Emergent' badge removal. All refactoring objectives achieved: PDF logic extracted to routes/pdf_exports.py, VendorPortalApp.jsx modularized, N+1 optimizations working, MongoDB indexes active, RBAC TTL caching functional, centralized API client operational.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin@garment.com/Admin@123 returns JWT token + user object
Token-based authorization works on protected endpoints (Bearer token)
GET /api/roles endpoint reachable with admin token (returns empty array)
RBAC TTL cache: repeated /api/roles calls work without breaking
GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns structured response with vendorLeadTimes, defectRates, weeklyThroughput, productCompletion, shipmentStats
GET /api/pdf-export-columns returns available_types array with 14 PDF types
GET /api/pdf-export-columns?pdf_type=production-po returns column definitions
GET /api/export-pdf?pdf_type=production-po returns 400 'id required' (correct behavior)
GET /api/serial-trace?serial=missing returns 200 with empty structure (correct behavior, not a bug)
GET /api/production-pos returns list (empty but working)
GET /api/po-items returns list (N+1 optimization working)
GET /api/vendor-shipments returns list (N+1 optimization working)
GET /api/vendor-material-inspections returns list (N+1 optimization working)
GET /api/financial-recap works with 10+ financial keys (N+1 optimization working)
GET /api/reports/shipment works (N+1 optimization working)
GET /api/reports/accessory works (N+1 optimization working)
GET /api/buyers returns list
GET /api/garments (vendors) returns list
GET /api/products returns list
GET /api/users returns list (1 admin user)
Frontend login page loads without JS errors
'Made with Emergent' badge successfully removed (no element with id 'emergent-badge' and no text 'Made with Emergent')
Successful login navigates to dashboard with proper metrics display
Sidebar navigation loads for superadmin role with 14 navigation items
Vendor portal modules load without runtime errors (modular VendorPortalApp.jsx working)
